category.scope_note: Cross-border compliance comparison for LED luminaires exported from China to Malaysia, focusing on ST, SIRIM, and related safety and product requirements.

title.en: LED luminaires: Malaysia (ST / SIRIM) vs China
title.zh: LED 照明灯具：马来西亚（ST / SIRIM）与中国对比
title.zht: LED 照明燈具：馬來西亞（ST / SIRIM）與中國對比

description.en: Use this map for China-exported LED luminaires to align ST CoA, SIRIM pathways, and additional Malaysia requirements with Chinese baseline obligations.
description.zh: 适用于中国出口 LED 照明灯具对接马来西亚市场，帮助将 ST CoA、SIRIM 与中国基线要求对齐。
description.zht: 適用於中國出口 LED 照明燈具對接馬來西亞市場，幫助將 ST CoA、SIRIM 與中國基線要求對齊。

disclaimer.en: Informational comparison only. Verify the latest legal and technical references before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 仅作信息参考。出货前请确认最新法律与技术文本。
disclaimer.zht: 僅作資訊參考。出貨前請確認最新法律與技術文本。

answer_first.en: Register the Malaysian importer route, then verify ST CoA and SIRIM alignment against Chinese test data, and finally check any wireless or telecom add-ons separately.
answer_first.zh: 先确定马来西亚进口方路径，再核对 ST CoA 与 SIRIM 的对接，再单独确认无线和通信类附加要求。
answer_first.zht: 先確定馬來西亞進口方路徑，再核對 ST CoA 與 SIRIM 的對接，最後單獨確認無線與通信類附加要求。
